name: Motion Collage Explainer
description: One-idea explainer short built from a bold screen-print cutout collage still (gpt-image-2) animated into a living collage with Seedance 2.0, narrated in a calm documentary 'In a Nutshell' explainer voice. No presenter, no screen recording.
best_for: single-concept explainer shorts (idioms, mental models, 'why does X happen')
faceless docu-style YouTube Shorts / Reels / TikTok
brand/SEO concept videos with a curious explainer voiceover
poster-style motion graphics without a real screenshot to prove
not_for: anything that needs a talking-head presenter

stages.title: Concept and script
actions: Pick ONE concept, idiom, or 'simple question' to explain
Write the docu explainer VO per MOTION_COLLAGE_STYLE.md (open on a question/scenario, name the concept, one analogy, takeaway, soft CTA)
Split into 3-6 beats, one poster per beat
Lock the video's single background color, outline weight, and label style

stages.title: Collage poster stills
actions: Build each poster with image_provider.py generate (gpt-image-2, 1024x1536 for 9:16) using the MOTION_COLLAGE_STYLE.md prompt formula
Grayscale halftone cutout subject on a flat saturated background, torn-paper label, 2-4 flat accent shapes
Regenerate or burn the label in post if the model typography is garbled
Keep every beat visually consistent as one series

stages.title: Living-collage motion
actions: Animate each approved still with fal_seedance_video.py --mode image (image-to-video) using the still as the reference
Prompt subtle living-collage motion only: parallax, gentle bob, drifting shapes, one literal concept motion; no scene change, no realify
4-6s per beat, 1080p, aspect matches target; fall back to FFmpeg Ken Burns + shape parallax if Seedance realifies the collage

stages.title: VO, captions, concat
actions: Generate the ElevenLabs explainer VO, Whisper-transcribe for word timing
Beat-lock every collage cut to sentence breaks
Concat beats, add centered karaoke captions clear of the torn-paper label band

stages.title: QC
actions: Confirm every frame still reads as a flat printed collage (no realify, no glow/neon/3D/gradient)
Check label legibility, consistent series look, loop-safe motion
Run ffmpeg_qc.py (yuv420p h264 aac, no black frames at joins)

qc_checks: every frame reads as a flat printed collage, not realified
no dark-cosmic / neon / glow / 3D / gradient AI-slop
label legible and series look consistent across beats
subtle loop-safe motion, no visible clip loop snap
captions synced to Whisper timing and clear of the label band
compliance_notes: Generate the collage from the prompt; never pass another brand's frames as image references.
Do not invent statistics for an explainer; ground any real claim.
